ValidationRule.description: Used to prevent Editing the Account Currency field from non-operation profiles
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(CurrencyIsoCode), NOT( OR( $Profile.Name = "System Administrator", $Profile.Name = "Sales Operations", $Profile.Name = "Deal Ops", $Profile.Name = "Renewal Ops", $Profile.Name = "Finance User" ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Editing the Account Currency is restricted. Please open a case to Operations to have this value updated.
